  "description": "Austine Mali Clothing is a contemporary fashion brand committed to redefining modern elegance through creativity, craftsmanship, and cultural authenticity. We design timeless yet forward-thinking pieces that celebrate individuality and confidence. As we expand our creative and digital footprint, we are seeking a passionate and experienced Social Media Manager &amp; Content Creator to bring our brand story to life across digital platforms, strengthen our online community, and enhance our visual identity.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Creator
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Social Media Manager &amp; Content Creator will be the creative voice and digital ambassador of Austine Mali Clothing.
	You will be responsible for developing and executing our social media strategy, producing compelling content, and growing our online presence across all relevant platforms.
	This is a dynamic, hands-on role that sits at the intersection of strategy, storytelling, and visual artistry, ideal for someone with a naturally creative eye and a genuine love of fashion.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Strategy &amp; Management


	Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with brand goals and marketing plans.
	Schedule, post, and manage daily content across Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and emerging platforms.
	Maintain monthly content calendars featuring new arrivals, brand stories, stockist updates, and event promotions.
	Monitor performance metrics and optimize content for engagement and growth.
	Stay updated on platform trends, algorithms, and new digital tools.


Content Creation, Design &amp; Studio Production:


	Conceptualize, shoot, and edit original photo and video content.
	Design branded social media graphics, templates, and visual assets (feed posts, stories, carousels, highlight covers, etc.).
	Create posts celebrating national holidays and notable events in Nigeria and the UK.
	Produce high-quality studio content during twice-weekly sessions.
	Collaborate with models, photographers, stylists, and the creative team.
	Create premium product images for e-commerce while maintaining brand consistency.
	Repurpose content for reels, TikToks, ads, and web usage.


Email Marketing:


	Design and execute email marketing campaigns, including newsletters, product launch announcements, and promotional sends.
	Build and maintain visually engaging, on-brand email templates.
	Manage subscriber lists and segment campaigns for targeted, effective messaging.
	Track open rates, click-through rates, and conversions, and refine campaigns accordingly.


Pinterest &amp; Visual Discovery Platforms:


	Create and maintain curated Pinterest boards showcasing collections, lookbooks, and brand aesthetics.
	Optimize pins and boards for discoverability and traffic generation.
	Explore and manage other visual/discovery platforms as relevant to brand growth.


Website &amp; Digital Traffic Growth:


	Develop content strategies to drive traffic to the brand website and improve conversions.
	Produce content educating customers about stockists, new collections, and events.
	Align social media, design, and email marketing activities with e-commerce and broader marketing initiatives.
	Use analytics to refine digital strategies.


Fashion Trend Research &amp; Brand Development:


	Stay updated on global and local fashion trends and cultural conversations.
	Study competitors and influencers for creative inspiration.
	Incorporate trend insights into visual storytelling and design.


On-Ground Brand Representation &amp; Event Coverage:


	Visit stockists to create engaging in-store and customer-experience content.
	Attend events, pop-ups, exhibitions, and fashion shows to capture live visuals.
	Support editorial shoots, lookbooks, and collection campaigns.
	Represent the brand professionally at events and collaborations.


Community Engagement &amp; Influencer Relations


	Build a strong, loyal online community through active engagement.
	Identify and partner with influencers and brand ambassadors who fit the brand ethos.


Reporting &amp; Optimization:


	Prepare detailed monthly reports on engagement, reach, email performance, and conversions.
	Use data insights to guide creative decisions and marketing improvements.
	Provide recommendations directly to the Creative Director.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	A naturally creative eye with a genuine flair for and love of fashion.
	3+ years of experience in social media management and content creation, preferably within fashion, lifestyle, or luxury brands.
	A strong, demonstrable portfolio showcasing photography, video production, graphic design, and/or email marketing work.
	Proven track record of growing social media followings and driving meaningful engagement.
	Proficiency with social media platforms, Pinterest, and scheduling tools.
	Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Lightroom), Canva, and email marketing platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar).
	Strong writing and storytelling skills with an excellent command of English; additional languages are an advantage.
	Deep understanding of fashion, aesthetics, and visual trends.
	Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects simultaneously, and meet deadlines.


Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume, &nbsp;portfolio or links to social media accounts you have managed, brief cover letter (no longer than one page) telling us why you are the right fit for Austine Mali Clothing to: nifemi.onyemali@austinemali.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you are a creative, driven, and fashion-forward professional ready to help shape the digital identity of a growing contemporary brand, we would love to hear from you.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team that reflects the richness of the cultures we draw inspiration from.

	Manage subscriber lists and segment campaigns for targeted, effective messaging.
	Track open rates, click-through rates, and conversions, and refine campaigns accordingly.

	A naturally creative eye with a genuine flair for and love of fashion.
	3+ years of experience in social media management and content creation, preferably within fashion, lifestyle, or luxury brands.
	A strong, demonstrable portfolio showcasing photography, video production, graphic design, and/or email marketing work.
	Proven track record of growing social media followings and driving meaningful engagement.
	Proficiency with social media platforms, Pinterest, and scheduling tools.
	Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Lightroom), Canva, and email marketing platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar).
	Strong writing and storytelling skills with an excellent command of English; additional languages are an advantage.

Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume,  portfolio or links to social media accounts you have managed, brief cover letter (no longer than one page) telling us why you are the right fit for Austine Mali Clothing to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you are a creative, driven, and fashion-forward professional ready to help shape the digital identity of a growing contemporary brand, we would love to hear from you.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team that reflects the richness of the cultures we draw inspiration from.

  "title": "Internal Auditor (Manager)",
  "description": "Miva Open University - We are an education company building a new kind of university targeted at the African region. Miva, a subsidiary of the uLesson Group, is a Pan-African Distance e-Learning University that is built on a couple of beliefs:

Firstly, we believe that the traditional brick-and-mortar approach to tertiary education is no longer a viable option for serving learners on the African continent. This approach will not provide the capacity and efficacy for the people of the region. We are building a university experience that leverages excellent academic talent (wherever it is to be found) and digital technologies to create a new, fresh, more efficacious and more accessible tertiary experience. Our second belief is that this new tertiary experience must not only meet but exceed the existing way of doing things in terms of quality, efficacy and preparing learners for the future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor (Manager)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time; Onsite

Overall Functions


	We are seeking an experienced Internal Auditor (Manager) to establish and lead the internal audit function across the uLesson Group.
	Reporting directly to the Group Chief Executive Officer, the Internal Auditor will provide independent assurance on the effectiveness of governance, risk management, and internal controls across the organisation.
	This role is responsible for developing and executing a risk-based audit plan, evaluating financial and operational processes, identifying control gaps, and providing practical recommendations that strengthen accountability, improve business performance, and support informed decision-making across the Group.


Key Responsibilties


	Develop and execute a comprehensive risk-based internal audit plan covering financial, operational, compliance, and technology-related processes across the Group.
	Plan and conduct end-to-end audit engagements, including audit planning, fieldwork, testing, reporting, and follow-up on agreed corrective actions.
	Evaluate the effectiveness of internal controls, governance processes, and risk management frameworks, recommending practical improvements where necessary.
	Assess compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and applicable accounting and governance standards.
	Investigate suspected fraud, financial irregularities, policy violations, and control breaches, providing timely reports and actionable recommendations.
	Review critical business processes&mdash;including procurement, payroll, revenue, expenditure, and IT controls&mdash;to identify operational inefficiencies and areas of risk.
	Prepare concise, insightful audit reports and present findings and recommendations to the Group CEO and senior leadership.
	Monitor the implementation of audit recommendations, track remediation progress, and escalate unresolved issues where appropriate.
	Support statutory audits by coordinating with external auditors and providing required documentation and audit evidence.
	Promote a culture of accountability, risk awareness, continuous improvement, and sound governance across the organisation.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or CIA is required.
	CISA certification is an added advantage.
	Minimum of six (6) years of internal or external audit experience, including at least two (2) years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Previous experience with a Big Four or top-tier audit firm is highly desirable.
	Strong knowledge of Internal Audit Standards (IIA), COSO Internal Control Framework, and enterprise risk management principles.
	Experience auditing within fast-paced, multi-entity organisations. Experience in technology, education, or startup environments is an advantage.
	Advanced analytical skills with the ability to interrogate large datasets using Microsoft Excel and other audit or ERP systems.
	Excellent report writing, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to communicate complex findings clearly and professionally.
	Demonstrated integrity, sound judgement, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently with a high level of objectivity.


Renumeration
Competitive.

Note


	If you are interested in achieving the next level of your career please fill the form
	We are determined to change the tertiary education landscape in the African region.
	This is an ambitious objective and we look forward to having a personal conversation with you to take things forward.
	Thank you for your interest.

	Develop and execute a comprehensive risk-based internal audit plan covering financial, operational, compliance, and technology-related processes across the Group.
	Plan and conduct end-to-end audit engagements, including audit planning, fieldwork, testing, reporting, and follow-up on agreed corrective actions.
	Evaluate the effectiveness of internal controls, governance processes, and risk management frameworks, recommending practical improvements where necessary.
	Assess compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and applicable accounting and governance standards.
	Investigate suspected fraud, financial irregularities, policy violations, and control breaches, providing timely reports and actionable recommendations.
	Review critical business processes—including procurement, payroll, revenue, expenditure, and IT controls—to identify operational inefficiencies and areas of risk.
	Prepare concise, insightful audit reports and present findings and recommendations to the Group CEO and senior leadership.
	Monitor the implementation of audit recommendations, track remediation progress, and escalate unresolved issues where appropriate.
	Support statutory audits by coordinating with external auditors and providing required documentation and audit evidence.
	Promote a culture of accountability, risk awareness, continuous improvement, and sound governance across the organisation.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or CIA is required.
	CISA certification is an added advantage.
	Minimum of six (6) years of internal or external audit experience, including at least two (2) years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Previous experience with a Big Four or top-tier audit firm is highly desirable.
	Strong knowledge of Internal Audit Standards (IIA), COSO Internal Control Framework, and enterprise risk management principles.
	Experience auditing within fast-paced, multi-entity organisations. Experience in technology, education, or startup environments is an advantage.
	Advanced analytical skills with the ability to interrogate large datasets using Microsoft Excel and other audit or ERP systems.
	Excellent report writing, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to communicate complex findings clearly and professionally.
	Demonstrated integrity, sound judgement, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently with a high level of objectivity.


Renumeration
Competitive.

Note


	If you are interested in achieving the next level of your career please fill the form
	We are determined to change the tertiary education landscape in the African region.
	This is an ambitious objective and we look forward to having a personal conversation with you to take things forward.
	Thank you for your interest.

Business Development Specialist Job at Proten International




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Proten International is an award-winning and leading international Human Resource and Management Consulting firm that provides a range of Advisory and Transformation solutions. Our focus is to align every organisation’s activities relating to People, Process and Technology closely with its business strategy and vision. Founded in 2011 in the United Kingdom, we have since expanded across Europe and Africa, serving clients across the public and private sectors and various industries including Banking, Oil and Gas, Insurance, Information Technology, Real Estate, Energy, FMCG, Manufacturing and many more. In 2015, we launched our Africa office in Lagos, Nigeria and have since provided a range of tailored solutions to various organisations. Our bespoke and innovative solutions cut across: Learning and Development, Recruitment and Talent Acquisition, Outsourcing / Managed Staffing, Enterprise Transformation, HR Advisory, HR Technology Get in touch with us! People | Process | Technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Specialist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Business Development Manager
Industry: HR Consulting / Recruitment / Training

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Business Development Specialist to lead B2B client acquisition and revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate will focus entirely on identifying prospective corporate clients, pitching to executive decision-makers, and closing deals for Recruitment, Learning & Development (L&D), and HR outsourcing services.


Key Responsibilities


	Prospect, cold-outreach, and pitch to HR Directors, CHROs, and C-Suite executives to secure new corporate clients.
	Present and sell tailored HR solutions, specifically Recruitment pipelines and corporate Learning & Development (L&D) programs.
	Handle proposals, navigate pricing negotiations, and close corporate contracts to hit monthly revenue targets.
	Build strong relationships with acquired clients to cross-sell and upsell other internal HR services.
	Track the sales funnel and provide weekly pipeline updates to the Business Development Manager.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, HR, Marketing, or a related field.
	3–5 years of proven experience strictly selling Recruitment, L&D, or HR consulting services to corporate clients.
	Elite communication, corporate presentation, and consultative negotiation skills.
	Target-driven, self-motivated "hunter" personality with a track record of closing B2B deals.


Salary
N500,000 monthly.
